title: task
description: rust/lichen-gateway/src/bin/lichend.rs:232-233 - When the sim connection fails and sim_task exits, the channel tx_send becomes closed. The line 'let _ = tx_send.try_send(schc)' silently ignores the error, causing outbound packets to be dropped without any warning or error log. Should at minimum log when packets are dropped due to channel closure.
